text:
ByOscar Hartzog

If you purchase an independently reviewed product or service through a link on our website, Rolling Stone may receive an affiliate commission.

The United States Men’s NationalSoccerTeam (USMNT) is on to the knockout stage at the 2024 ParisOlympics. In the quarterfinals, they’ll be sharing the pitch against Morocco.

Where to Stream:Peacock,DirecTV Stream,Hulu + Live TV,fubo, Discovery+ (UK) withVPNTV Channel:USA Network, TelemundoDate, Start Time:9 a.m. ET/6 a.m. PT

Both teams entered the competition as potential favorites to win medals. In the group stage, both secured two wins and suffered one loss, netting six points to make the quarterfinals. The USMNT hasn’t made it to anOlympicsknockout stage since Sydney 2000. They also started Paris 2024 with a falter, losing 3-0 to France. But the team bounced back quickly with a 4-1 over New Zealand and a 3-0 victory against Guinea.

Figuring out how to watch USMNT vs. Morocco? Read on. We’ve put together a full guide on where to watch thesoccergame on TV, where to livestream USMNT vs. Morocco online, and how to watch USMNT vs. Morocco forfree.

Today’s USMNT vs. Morocco soccer game is airing live on USA Network and Telemundo. If you’re watching the Olympics soccer game without cable, you can livestream USMNT vs. Morocco using Peacock or any live TV streaming service that carries the above channels. If you have a VPN, you can also stream the game on Discovery+ (UK version).

Peacockis the best option for most Olympics viewers, offering streams of every event for $7.99 a month. There’s no free trial, however.



Peacock offers both live and on-demand content, including sports like WWE, Golf, and Olympics, and series likeThe OfficeandYellowstone. Subscriptions start at $7.99 a month.

Cord-cutters can also watch USMNT vs. Morocco online using a live TV streaming service that carries USA Network, such asDirecTV Stream. This one starts with afive-day free trialand costs $79.99 a month after that.



DirecTV Stream is one of the most comprehensive live TV streaming services with up to 160+ channels, including local channels, regional sports networks, and all popular national channels. Packages start at $79.99 a month and all subscriptions start with a five-day free trial.

fubois another great live TV streaming service that carries USA Network for a USMNT vs. Morocco livestream. fubo starts with aweek-long free trial, and then payment kicks in at $79.99 a month.



fubo’s massive streaming plans carry up to 275+ channels, and you can get even more depending on your location. Packages start at $79.99 a month, and you get seven days to try the service for free.

You can also watch today’s USMNT vs. Morocco game onHulu + Live TV, which carries USA Network and over 90 other channels. It costs $76.99 a month but starts with athree-day free trial.



Hulu + Live TV bundles together Hulu’s on-demand library and over 95 live TV channels, including local channels and almost all popular national channels. Subscriptions also include ESPN+ and Disney+ at no additional cost. Hulu + Live TV costs $76.99 a month after a three-day free trial.

If you have a good VPN, likeExpressVPN, you can tune into British Olympics broadcasts on the UK’s Discovery+. The UK streaming service costs just £3.99 (a little over $5) a month, making it cheaper than Peacock.



ExpressVPN offers internet access in up to 160 locations around the world, making it easy to tune into local networks to watch live sports coverage online. Plans start at $12.95 a month (but right now you can get three months free when signing up for an annual package). Plus: All your info will be kept secure and private.

If you’re looking to watch USMNT vs. Morocco for free, be sure to use a free trial fromDirecTV Stream,fubo, orHulu + Live TV. All of these free trials will get you a free USMNT vs. Morocco soccer livestream, plus a few other free Olympics streams while the trial lasts. Just remember to cancel before it’s over to avoid being charged.

The USMNT vs. Morocco Olympics soccer game is happening today, Friday, Aug. 2. The match starts at 9 a.m. ET/6 a.m. PT.

We want to hear it. Send us a tip using our anonymous form.

title: How to Watch USMNT vs. Morocco Olympics Soccer Game Online for Free
author: Oscar Hartzog
description: Here’s how to watch USMNT vs. Morocco online during the 2024 Olympics, plus where to get a free USMNT vs. Morocco livestream without cable.
